last_prompt: Evaluate the agent memory system (impl-3) and intelligent task scheduling (impl-4) implementations. Verify: 1) Memory files are created and updated correctly across iterations, 2) Memory context is properly injected into agent prompts, 3) The task scheduler produces correct orderings for various scenarios, 4) Edge cases are handled (empty task list, all failed tasks, circular scoring). Run 'cargo test' and 'cargo clippy'. Document any issues found.
